patterns.atomic_write_pattern: Use PathBuf::with_extension to create temp path, fs::write to temp, then fs::rename for atomic commit
patterns.reaper_pattern: reap_orphans function reads running/, checks PID liveness via kill -0, handles meta.json parsing errors, moves cards to pending/ or failed/
patterns.cli_pattern: Commands are enum variants in Command enum, handled in main() match statement
patterns.error_handling: Functions return anyhow::Result<()>, use ? for propagation

existing_implementations.description: reap_orphans already exists in reaper.rs and handles orphaned cards with dead PIDs during runtime

crash_safety_context.problem: fs::write truncates file before writing, leaving empty/partial file on crash
crash_safety_context.solution: write-to-temp-then-rename pattern is atomic on POSIX/APFS
crash_safety_context.recovery_mechanism: Startup scan of running/ directory before dispatcher loop begins
